description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. The workflow has four jobs: docs, lint, test, and coveralls. The docs and lint jobs run on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, install tox, and test with tox. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.6-3.10, installs dependencies, tests with tox, and generates a coverage report. The coveralls job depends on the test job and uploads the coverage results to Coveralls.
